basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iitg.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Guwahati Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc./B.E./B.Tech in Electronics Engineering or equivalent
qualification.details: M.Sc./B.E./B.Tech in Electronics Engineering or equivalent.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Guwahati JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the IIT Guwahati JRF Recruitment 2026 is 28th May 2026. Ensure you submit your application well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment drive is Junior Research Fellow (JRF).

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the JRF post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position in this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. or B.E./B.Tech degree in Electronics Engineering or an equivalent qualification to be eligible for the JRF post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the JRF position will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 18600 to Rs. 19850.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the IIT Guwahati JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for the IIT Guwahati JRF Recruitment 2026 will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is online. Candidates need to apply through the official website of IIT Guwahati.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Guwahati located?
faq.answer: IIT Guwahati is located in Guwahati, Assam, with the pincode 781039.

faq.question: Q10. When is the interview date for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The interview for the JRF post is scheduled to be held on 01 June 2026.
